description: Engineering decision that passes Gate 1 but fails Gate 2 — drop
source: The export API returns fields: user_id, email, created_at, plan_type, and last_login_at. The token response contract includes access_token, refresh_token, and expires_in.
rationale: Passes Gate 1 (has a business context — user export, token auth). Fails Gate 2: any team implementing this API would return the same essential fields. No fork existed — this is a specification of WHAT is returned, not a choice between alternatives. Redundancy pruning: definition of interface contract.
